ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Distribution Of Reserve
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Distribution Of Reserve
Off Calendar Jul-10-2023 Continued To Aug-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Distribution Of Reserve
Off Calendar Mar-20-2023 Continued To Jul-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey appeared by zoom for Linda Simmons (administrator).

Mrs. Espey stated that there are no taxes or closing costs remaining, that they are still receiving checks that are payable to estate for refunds and that her client wants to keep the estate account open. Mrs. Espey also stated that they are happy to distribute the reserves as there is more than enough needed, and that the beneficiaries are happy to waive an accounting. Status on distribution of the reserve is continued to July 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Distribution Of Reserve
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Continued To Mar-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
